name: 泉州
description: Quanzhou is a historic port city in Fujian, known as the starting point of the Maritime Silk Road. Home to diverse religious sites including Buddhism, Islam, Christianity, and Hinduism. Called 'Zayton' by Marco Polo. A UNESCO World Heritage city with incredible cultural diversity.
highlights: Kaiyuan Temple - Largest Song Dynasty temple in Fujian
Qingjing Mosque - Oldest mosque in China
Sri Lankan Buddhist Temple - Unique foreign architecture
Maritime Silk Road Museum - Ancient trade history

climate.tips: Best in spring and autumn. Summers hot and humid. Winter mild. Year-round destination due to cultural sites.

attractions.name: 开元寺
attractions.description: Largest Song Dynasty Buddhist temple in Fujian with famous twin pagodas.
attractions.tips: Arrive early. The twin pagodas are iconic.

attractions.name: 清净寺
attractions.description: Oldest mosque in China, built in 1009, with Arab architecture.

attractions.name: 泉州木偶戏
attractions.description: Traditional Fujian puppet theater with ancient marionette art.
attractions.tips: Book tickets in advance. Must-see cultural experience.

attractions.name: 清源山
attractions.description: Sacred mountain with Buddhist temples, ancient sculptures, and tea houses.
attractions.tips: Visit at sunrise for views. Try mountain tea.

attractions.name: 天后宫
attractions.description: Most important Mazu temple, goddess of the sea worshipped by sailors.
attractions.tips: Important for maritime culture. Try Mazu cookies nearby.

attractions.name: 洛阳桥
attractions.description: Ancient Song Dynasty stone bridge, one of China's four famous bridges.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Ancient engineering marvel.

attractions.name: 府文庙
attractions.description: Largest Confucian temple in Fujian with beautiful architecture.

attractions.name: 海外交通史博物馆
attractions.description: Museum showcasing Quanzhou's ancient maritime trade history.

attractions.name: 南少林寺
attractions.description: Famous martial arts temple where Chinese boxing originated.
attractions.tips: Watch martial arts performances. Great for kung fu fans.

attractions.name: 石狮黄金海岸
attractions.description: Beautiful beach area with coastal scenery and resort facilities.
attractions.tips: Best for beach time. Day trip from Quanzhou.

attractions.name: 闽台缘博物馆
attractions.description: Museum showcasing cultural connections between Fujian and Taiwan.

attractions.name: 涂门街
attractions.description: Historic street with diverse religious buildings from multiple faiths.
attractions.tips: Walk to see mosque, temple, church on same street.

attractions.name: 崇武古城
attractions.description: Ming Dynasty coastal fortress with stone carvers and beaches.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Famous for stone carving tradition.

attractions.name: 牛姆林
attractions.description: Nature reserve with ancient trees, hiking trails, and fresh air.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Great for nature lovers.

attractions.name: 仙公山
attractions.description: Sacred mountain with temples, stunning views, and folk temple fair.
attractions.tips: Take cable car. Popular with locals for blessings.

attractions.name: 泉州博物馆
attractions.description: Regional museum with collections on Quanzhou history and culture.

attractions.name: 蟳埔渔村
attractions.description: Traditional fishing village with unique sea snail shell houses and local women wearing floral headpieces.
attractions.tips: Visit in early morning to see fishermen returning with catch.

attractions.name: 郑和航海遗迹
attractions.description: Historical sites related to Zheng He's voyages, including his temple and navigation monuments.
attractions.tips: Learn about China's maritime exploration history.

attractions.name: 永宁古卫城
attractions.description: Ming Dynasty coastal defense fortress, one of the three major forts in Fujian.

attractions.name: 黄金渔排
attractions.description: Unique floating fish farm experience on the sea with fresh seafood dining.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Eat fresh seafood right from the sea.

attractions.name: 闽南建筑博物馆
attractions.description: Museum showcasing traditional Minnan architectural styles including tulou-like buildings.
attractions.tips: Great for understanding Minnan building techniques.

attractions.name: 泉州创意产业园
attractions.description: Former factory converted to art and creative hub with galleries, cafes, and workshops.
attractions.tips: Good for modern art and souvenirs.

attractions.name: 惠安女民俗村
attractions.description: Experience the unique culture of Hui'an women known for their colorful costumes and fishing traditions.
attractions.tips: Watch women weave and learn about their unique customs.

attractions.name: 九仙山
attractions.description: Sacred Taoist mountain with unique rock formations, sea of clouds, and alpine meadows.
attractions.tips: Best visited after rainfall for cloud seas.

attractions.name: 德化陶瓷博物馆
attractions.description: Museum dedicated to Dehua porcelain, also called 'white gold', with 1000-year history.
attractions.tips: Buy authentic Dehua porcelain as souvenirs.

attractions.name: 清净寺
attractions.description: 中国现存最古老的阿拉伯式清真寺。

attractions.name: 清源山

attractions.name: 泉州美食
attractions.description: 泉州有面线糊和各种小吃。

attractions.name: 关帝庙

attractions.name: 泉州夜景

attractions.name: 洛阳桥

attractions.name: 天后宫

attractions.name: 泉州博物馆

attractions.name: 承天寺
attractions.description: 泉州最古老的佛教寺院之一。

attractions.name: 泉州肉粽
attractions.description: 泉州最著名的传统美食。

attractions.name: 崇武古城
attractions.description: 中国现存最完整的石砌海防城堡之一。

attractions.name: 九日山
attractions.description: 泉州西部的山，有祈风石刻。

attractions.name: 草庵
attractions.description: 中国现存唯一的摩尼教寺庙。

attractions.name: 涂门街
attractions.description: 泉州最古老的街区之一。

attractions.name: 西湖公园
attractions.description: 泉州最美的公园。

attractions.name: 西街夜景
attractions.description: 泉州西街的夜景灯光秀。

attractions.name: 泉州湾古船陈列馆
attractions.description: 展示泉州古代船只的博物馆。

attractions.name: 泉州面线糊
attractions.description: 泉州最著名的传统美食。

attractions.name: 紫帽山
attractions.description: 泉州南部的山脉。

arrival.tips: Airport 15km from city center. Taxi or bus.

culturalTips.title: Maritime Silk Road
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou was major port on Maritime Silk Road, visited by Marco Polo who called it Zayton. Diverse foreign religions settled here including Islam, Christianity, Hinduism.

culturalTips.title: Religious Diversity
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou has unique religious diversity - Buddhist temples, Islamic mosques, Christian churches, and Hindu ruins coexist on Tumen Street.

culturalTips.title: Minnan Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou is heart of Minnan cuisine known for seafood, ginger duck, rice dumplings, and unique snacks like 土笋冻 (tusun jelly).

culturalTips.title: Stone Carving
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou and nearby Hui'an are famous for stone carving tradition, visible at Chongwu Ancient City.

culturalTips.title: Southern Shaolin
culturalTips.content: Southern Shaolin Temple at Qingyuan Mountain is birthplace of many Chinese martial arts styles including Hung Gar boxing.

culturalTips.title: Overseas Chinese Heritage
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou is major overseas Chinese hometown. Many Chinese diaspora from Southeast Asia trace ancestry here. The华侨文化 is strong.

culturalTips.title: Minnan Architectural Style
culturalTips.content: Minnan houses feature red brick, white walls, and ornate roof ridges with upturned corners. The闽南建筑风格 is distinct from other Chinese regional styles.

culturalTips.title: Mazu Worship
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou is important center for Mazu worship, the sea goddess. Tianhou Palace is one of the most important Mazu temples in the world.

culturalTips.title: Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Fujian is famous for tea, and Quanzhou has its own tea traditions. Visit tea houses on 清源山 to experience mountain tea culture.

culturalTips.title: Nanyin Music
culturalTips.content: Nanyin (南音) is ancient music from Quanzhou, recognized as intangible cultural heritage. Listen to performances at Quanzhou Puppet Show.

culturalTips.title: Minnan Dialect
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou speakers use Minnanhua (闽南话), a distinct dialect group. It's mutually intelligible with Taiwanese and Southeast Asian Chinese communities.

culturalTips.title: 惠安女 Culture
culturalTips.content: Hui'an women are famous for their colorful costumes, including直达髻 headpieces and short上衣. They traditionally handle fishing while men work abroad.

culturalTips.title: Seafood Culture
culturalTips.content: Being a coastal city, seafood is central to Quanzhou cuisine. Fresh fish, crab, shrimp, and shellfish appear in most dishes.

culturalTips.title: Zheng He Connections
culturalTips.content: Zheng He, the famous Ming Dynasty admiral, was associated with Quanzhou. His maritime legacy is celebrated at several historical sites.

culturalTips.title: Buddhist Heritage
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou has been Buddhist center for over 1000 years. Kaiyuan Temple and Qingyuan Mountain are important Buddhist sites.

culturalTips.title: Dehua Porcelain
culturalTips.content: Dehua County near Quanzhou produces world-famous white porcelain, called 'white gold' in ancient times. Visit museums and factories.

culturalTips.title: Street Food Culture
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou has vibrant night markets and street food culture. Try local snacks at路边摊 and传统小贩 for authentic flavors.

culturalTips.title: Traditional Festivals
culturalTips.content: Quanzhou celebrates traditional festivals with unique customs including Mazu birthday, 中秋博饼, and various temple fairs.

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
